{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Karoshan Ambassador
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Karoshan Ambassador]] is a woman with leathery purple skin and violet hair-cables.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23">''The Engineer'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
